title: narcissus × paivae
intro: Narcissus × paivae, also known as the Paiva narcissus, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Narcissus pseudonarcissus and Narcissus pseudonarcissus var. lactiflorus. The Paiva narcissus is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues and its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from coughs and colds, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of asthma and bronchitis. The herbal preparations of Narcissus × paivae include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the plant's flowers and leaves and steeping them in hot water.
